scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format && pnpm typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/openai-adapter typecheck && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/discord-adapter typecheck && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/cloudflare-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/cloudflare-workers typecheck && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/dashboard typecheck
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/core test:run && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/contracts test:run && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/openai-adapter test:run && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/discord-adapter test:run && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/cloudflare-runtime test:run && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/cloudflare-workers test:run
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/core test:coverage && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/contracts test:coverage && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/openai-adapter test:coverage && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/discord-adapter test:coverage && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/cloudflare-runtime test:coverage && pnpm --filter @echo-chamber/cloudflare-workers test:coverage
